name: FitVerse
description: AI-Powered Fitness Coach web application built with IBM watsonx.ai Granite and Flask. Features personalized workout plans, nutrition advice, BMI/BMR calculator, habit tracker, and a ChatGPT-style AI fitness coach.

scripts.postdeploy: python -c "from app import create_app; from models import db; app = create_app(); app.app_context().push(); db.create_all()"

SECRET_KEY.description: A secret key used to sign Flask session cookies. Use a long random string.

WATSONX_API_KEY.description: Your IBM Cloud API Key. Get it from https://cloud.ibm.com/iam/apikeys

WATSONX_PROJECT_ID.description: Your IBM watsonx.ai Project ID. Found in your watsonx.ai project settings.

WATSONX_URL.description: IBM watsonx.ai endpoint URL. e.g. https://us-south.ml.cloud.ibm.com or https://au-syd.ml.cloud.ibm.com

WATSONX_MODEL_ID.description: IBM Granite or Llama model ID to use for AI responses.

DATABASE_URL.description: Database connection URL. Defaults to SQLite for local, use PostgreSQL for production.

technologies.name: IBM watsonx.ai
technologies.description: AI foundation model platform powering the FitBot coach using Granite and Llama models

technologies.name: Flask
technologies.description: Python micro web framework for the backend API and server-side rendering

technologies.name: Bootstrap 5
technologies.description: Frontend CSS framework for responsive, mobile-first UI

technologies.name: Chart.js
technologies.description: JavaScript library for progress charts and data visualisation

technologies.name: SQLite / SQLAlchemy
technologies.description: Database layer for user profiles, workouts, meals, habits, and chat history
